hero.subtitle: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Deploy a professional-grade Discord presence in minutes. Modular, self-hosted, and built for communities that demand more.

automation.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Automation Rules
automation.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Create complex event-driven workflows without code. If-this-then-that triggers with 23 event types and 10 action types.

music.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] High-fidelity audio streaming with multi-platform support. Queue management, DJ controls, and library mode.

tempVoice.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] TempVoice
tempVoice.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Dynamic voice channel management. Auto-creation with custom naming templates, permissions, and cleanup.

webhooks.title: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Webhooks & API
webhooks.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Send data to external services with HTTP webhooks. Custom headers, body templates, and variable interpolation.

dashboard.description: [NEEDS TRANSLATION] Manage everything from a sleek web dashboard. Analytics, configuration, and monitoring in one place.
